channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Sharks start slow as ugly streak against Golden Knights continues
item.description: San Jose Sharks fall behind by two goals to Vegas Golden Knights on two occasions and never fully recover in a 4-2 loss at SAP Center.
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: Kerr says ‘deflated’ Warriors lack ‘competitive spirit’ in loss to Miami Heat
item.description: The Warriors finished 3-3 on their six-game homestand, dropping the final two games to the Kings and Heat.
item.dc:creator: Evan Webeck, The Mercury News

item.title: Trae Young's 49-foot buzzer-beater lifts Hawks to a 124-121 win over the Jazz
item.description: Trae Young hit a buzzer-beating 3-pointer from beyond the halfcourt line to give the Atlanta Hawks a 124-121 victory over the Utah Jazz.
item.dc:creator: John Coon, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Indoor golf league created by Tiger Woods and Rory McIlroy has a loud, swift debut match
item.description: PALM BEACH GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — Ludvig Aberg will be the answer to a trivia question: He made the first birdie in TGL history. And with that, the indoor golf competition that Tiger Woods and Rory McIlroy had envisioned for years was finally underway.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Ready for takeoff: Duke star Cooper Flagg puts highlight-dunk signature on Pittsburgh win
item.description: DURHAM, N.C. (AP) — Cooper Flagg was still simmering, angry at himself, for picking up his third foul so early in the second half before knocking away an entry pass to force a turnover.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Justin Verlander and the Giants agree to a $15 million, 1-year contract, AP source says
item.description: Justin Verlander and the San Francisco Giants have agreed to a $15 million, one-year contract, according to a person with direct knowledge of the negotiations.
item.dc:creator: Janie Mccauley, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: LIV Golf fills out its 2025 schedule with final 3 events going head-to-head with PGA Tour
item.description: LIV Golf will play its final three events in the United States the same week as the FedEx Cup playoffs on the PGA Tour.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Grayson Murray's passion remembered during solemn tribute at the tournament he won
item.description: HONOLULU (AP) — The Sony Open turned solemn Tuesday morning when dozens of players, caddies and PGA Tour officials joined Grayson Murray's family along the shore behind the 16th green at Waialae to pay tribute to the defending champion who took his own life four months later.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Scottie Scheffler to miss 2nd tournament over freak hand injury
item.description: World No. 1 golfer Scottie Scheffler is missing is second tournament due to a freak hand injury suffered while preparing Christmas dinner.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Deion Sanders gives 1-word reaction to Titans firing general manager as son Shedeur could be top pick
item.description: With Shedeur Sanders a candidate to go No. 1 overall to the Titans, his dad, Deion, let out his reaction to the team firing their general manager on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chargers plan to sign Ezekiel Elliott to practice squad after his release by Cowboys
item.description: The Los Angeles Chargers are planning to sign running back Ezekiel Elliott to their practice squad pending a physical, two people familiar with the situation told The Associated Press January 6.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: CMU Women's wrestler Marissa Gallegos reflects on wrestling journey
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—Marissa Gallegos is no stranger to the spotlight. The Colorado Mesa University star has cemented her legacy as the winningest women’s wrestler in program history. Her career, defined by grit, dominance, and determination, has inspired athletes across the sport.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Jets interview Rex Ryan, who led franchise to its last playoff appearance, for head coaching job
item.description: Rex Ryan has returned to the New York Jets — for an interview, at least. The former Jets coach and current ESPN analyst, who led the franchise to its last playoff appearance to cap the 2010 season, met with the team Tuesday about its head coaching vacancy.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Titans fire GM Ran Carthon after two seasons despite big spending spree
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — General manager Ran Carthon paid the price for the Tennessee Titans going 9-25 in his two seasons. The Titans introduced Carthon as the franchise's first Black general manager in January 2023, and he helped the franchise hire a new coach in Brian Callahan a year later.
item.dc:creator: TERESA M. WALKER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bulls' Coby White throws down vicious dunk over 7-foot-3 phenom Victor Wembanyama
item.description: Chicago Bulls guard Coby White threw down an emphatic dunk on the San Antonio Spurs' 7-foot-3 phenom Victor Wembanyama on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Suns' Beal stars as a reserve in win over 76ers and makes it clear he believes he is an NBA starter
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Bradley Beal made the most of the unfamiliar role of substitute for the Phoenix Suns. That doesn't mean he had to like it.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mavericks guard Kyrie Irving out due to bulging disk in his back, no timeline for return
item.description: MEMPHIS, Tenn. (AP) — Dallas guard Kyrie Irving is expected to miss one to two weeks with a bulging disk in his back, and Mavericks coach Jason Kidd said a timeline for his return was not immediately known.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Los Angeles Dodgers agree to trade Gavin Lux to Reds: report
item.description: The post World Series shakeup continues in Los Angeles, as the Dodgers are poised to trade starting second-baseman Gavin Lux to the Cincinnati Reds. As reported by ESPN's Jeff Passan, the Dodgers will send Lux to the Reds in exchange for a future draft pick and outfield prospect Mike Sirota.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Report: Bears seek permission to interview Cowboys' Mike McCarthy for head coaching vacancy
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago Bears have sought permission to interview Dallas Cowboys head coach Mike McCarthy and are awaiting a response from the Cowboys, according to ESPN's Adam Schefter.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Jaguars return home after getting stuck on Indianapolis tarmac for 7 hours during storm
item.description: The Jacksonville Jaguars returned home early Monday after spending seven hours waiting through a winter storm on the tarmac at Indianapolis International Airport.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Broncos clinch playoffs after 38-0 win over Chiefs
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — They say, "It ain't how you start; it's how you finish." For the Denver Broncos, their season finale had it all—high stakes, playoff hopes, and a shot at redemption against a Kansas City Chiefs team resting most of its stars.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Colts owner Jim Irsay says he's retaining GM Chris Ballard and coach Shane Steichen
item.description: About four hours after the Colts completed their season with a 26-23 overtime victory over the Jacksonville Jaguars, Irsay ended any speculation about possible offseason changes by announcing in a letter to fans that longtime general manager Chris Ballard and second-year coach Shane Steichen would r
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Buccaneers beat Saints 27-19 to clinch NFC South and wide receiver Mike Evans surpasses 1,000 yards
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — Just 36 seconds away from clinching the NFC South title, the Tampa Bay Buccaneers had another goal to achieve. Take a knee on their 32-yard line and run out the clock? No chance. Mike Evans still needed 5 yards to make history.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bears walk-off the Packers to end the season 5-12
item.description: GREEN BAY, Wisc. (WGN) — For the first time in weeks, The Chicago Bears showed life in the NFL's oldest rivalry and found a way to win at the end of the ballgame. Here's how their final contest of the 2024-25 regular season played out.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Joe Burrow and the Cincinnati Bengals keep their playoff hopes alive by edging the Steelers 19-17
item.description: Joe Burrow passed for 277 yards and a touchdown, Cade York kicked four field goals and the Cincinnati Bengals kept their slim playoff hopes alive with a 19-17 win over the floundering Pittsburgh Steelers on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: White nails career-high nine 3s, scores 33 as Bulls beat Knicks 139-126 after honoring Rose
item.description: Coby White made a career-high nine 3-pointers and scored 33 points, Zach LaVine also had 33 and the Chicago Bulls beat the New York Knicks 139-126 after honoring former MVP Derrick Rose on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: BYU gets trounced by #14 Houston 86-55
item.description: HOUSTON (ABC4 Sports) - The BYU basketball team came into the Big 12 season thinking it could compete with the top teams in one of the toughest leagues in the nation. But if Saturday was any indication, the Cougars have a long way to go.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah HC storms back at Calgary to end five-game skid
item.description: CALGARY (ABC4 Sports) - Lawson Crouse scored twice, and the Utah Hockey Club rallied for a 5-3 win against the Calgary Flames at Scotiabank Saddledome on Thursday to end a five-game losing skid.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Big Will's Week 18 NFL Picks
item.description: In this edition of NFL picks, Big Will focuses on the final AFC wildcard spot as three teams fight for the 7-seed.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Rams QB Matthew Stafford gets home inspected amid string of NFL home burglaries
item.description: A string of high-profile burglaries at the homes of NFL players that has even prompted a warning from the FBI has led one of the brightest stars of Los Angeles to take a proactive approach to the issue.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Allstate Sugar Bowl postponed
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—The Caesars Superdome was placed under lockdown Wednesday after a pickup truck drove into a New Year’s crowd about a mile away, killing at least 15 people and injuring dozens, city and federal officials said.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Pistons guard Jaden Ivey sustains leg injury in victory over the Magic
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — Detroit guard Jaden Ivey sustained what appeared to be a severe injury to his lower left leg in the fourth quarter of Detroit's victory over the Orlando Magic on Wednesday night. Orlando's Cole Anthony slipped and fell as he and Ivey went for the ball.
item.dc:creator: DAVE HOGG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Sugar Bowl CFP quarterfinal between Georgia and Notre Dame postponed after deadly truck attack
item.description: The College Football Playoff quarterfinal at the Sugar Bowl between Georgia and Notre Dame was postponed a day because of an attack about a mile away from the Superdome early Wednesday, when authorities say a truck driver deliberately plowed into a New Year’s crowd and killed 15 people.
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: White Sox trade for left-handed reliever from Phillies
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago White Sox traded for a left-handed reliever from the Philadelphia Phillies in exchange for a minor league prospect. In exchange for minor-league right-hander Aaron Combs, the White Sox acquired 31-year-old left-handed pitcher Tyler Gilbert from the Phillies.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: LeBron James' youngest son Bryce commits to Arizona
item.description: Bryce James, son of NBA star LeBron James, is heading to Arizona. Bryce James announced his decision Wednesday on Instagram and his father had a quick response.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Sugar Bowl postponed to Thursday night
item.description: Hours following the New Year's Day tragedy on Bourbon Street, Wednesday's Allstate Sugar Bowl bout between Notre Dame and Georgia is being postponed.
item.dc:creator: Richie Mills, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Illinois holds off South Carolina in Citrus Bowl for first 10-win season since 2001
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — Josh McCray scored his second touchdown of the game on a 9-yard run midway through the fourth quarter to give No. 21 Illinois the lead, and the Illini held on to beat No. 14 South Carolina, 21-17, in the Cheez-It Citrus Bowl on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
